---
title: "Hello again"
description: "Resurrecting the blog on a new stack."
date: "2026-04-19"
categories: [meta]
---

After a long hiatus, the blog is back, now living as part of my main academic
site. The old blog, *Couldn't Stand the Weather*, will stay where it is for
archival purposes; new posts will appear here.

The site and blog are built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org/) and deployed to
GitHub Pages. Source is on [GitHub](https://github.com/spencerahill/my-website).

More soon on climate, music, and whatever else pulls my attention.
